title: • Exploring the role of reflection in improving writing over time.
content:
• Exploring the role of reflection in improving writing over time.

Day 22 | Editing for Clarity & Precision | Tuesday

🎯 Focus:
• Strengthening clarity, conciseness, and fluency in writing.
• Using editing strategies to refine final essays.
• Practicing peer and self-editing techniques to ensure high-quality revisions.
